name: Willowcreek Golf Academy
about: The Willowcreek Golf Academy is a year-round, public facility positioned as the most technologically advanced teaching center in the Northeast. It is a 10,000-square-foot state-of-the-art training space dedicated to educating and advancing golfers of all skill levels. The academy offers custom club fitting and lessons led by award-winning PGA professionals who utilize advanced coaching tools. The venue provides a heated driving range and private coaching studios to support its educational mission, making it suitable for serious practice and improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium technology including TrackMan launch monitors and V1 Pro Video Analysis
Adaptive club fitting services through PING, one of only ten facilities in the country to offer this
Private coaching studios for a customized learning experience away from the main range
Year-round access to a heated, state-of-the-art practice facility
Programs specifically designed for junior golfers and camps for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining options available at Stagecoach Grille and Merrill's Tavern at the resort.
Full bar and restaurant services available on-site at the resort's establishments.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor and ball tracking system used for coaching and fitting

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the academy provides custom club fitting services and equipment is available for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The resort has on-site dining options including Stagecoach Grille and Merrill's Tavern with full kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not available for the academy facility. The academy focuses on practice, lessons, and fitting, not on playing a full course.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Willowcreek Golf Academy offers specific junior golf programs, camps, and clinics designed for young players to learn and develop their skills.
